description: Unit test specifications for the Popover component in Bootstrap, testing its API, behavior, and integration with jQuery mock.

classes.name: Popover
classes.description: Main class for Bootstrap's popover component, providing methods for showing, hiding, and configuring popovers.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Popover instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Popover instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.
